name: agent-cache-optimizer
description: Codex companion for cache-friendly agent prompts, local optimizer status, and prompt-cache guidance.

interface.shortDescription: Inspect optimizer status and keep Codex prompts cache-friendly.
interface.longDescription: Agent Cache Optimizer helps Codex users inspect local cache-optimizer status, understand current OpenCode prompt-reordering data, and apply cache-friendly prompt structure guidance for Codex CLI sessions.
defaultPrompt: Review this repo for cache-friendly Codex setup.
